column1: # One-shot backfill of historical attendance for the BPM badminton group.
# See scripts/backfill-attendance.mjs for the cookie-extraction steps.
# Names must match member records in Cosmos exactly (case-insensitive).
# Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# IMPORTANT: this is the entire group's history dating back 2026-02-19.
# Edit this file with each session date + who attended that night
# run the script. Re-running is safe (idempotent).

column2: Grant Bruce Chris David Desmond Ethan
